insights.title: Labor overran budget by 10.8%
insights.finding: Total labor actual $593,780 vs budget $535,720 — $58,060 unfavorable variance. Review crew mix and productivity.

insights.title: Scope stability — 3 executed COs net $0 (+0.00% of contract)
insights.finding: Minimal scope churn indicates well-defined contract and experienced GC. Candidate GC profile for future similar bids.

insights.title: Largest variance — cost code 230 (Finish Material) under by $92,834
insights.finding: Budget $521,715, actual $428,881 (-17.8%). Flag for bid calibration.

direct_cost.source: Σ labor + material + OH + burden + tax
